name: Traptrix Rafflesia
name_jp: フレシアの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>蟲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>惑</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>わく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
2 Level 4 monsters
Unaffected by Trap effects while it has material. "Traptrix" monsters you control, except "Traptrix Rafflesia", cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects. Your opponent cannot target "Traptrix" monsters you control, except "Traptrix Rafflesia", with card effects. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can detach 1 material from this card and send 1 "Hole" Normal Trap that meets its activation conditions from your Deck to the GY; this effect becomes that Trap Card's effect when that card is activated.

jp_sets.set: Structure Deck: Forest of the Traptrix
Structure Deck: Forest of the Traptrix - The Legend of Duelist Quarter Century Edition

action: Applies effects if Xyz Material is attached
Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
mst: Prevents other cards being destroyed by card effects
Prevents other cards being targeted by card effects
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
attack: Prevents other cards being destroyed by battle
